description_long: This lamp features a modern, minimalist design with a cylindrical gray lampshade perched atop a tripod base made of light-colored wood. The wooden legs are angled outward, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The lampshade is smooth and opaque, likely diffusing light softly when illuminated. The base is composed of three sturdy wooden legs that converge at the top, supporting the shade securely. The overall form is compact and functional, suitable for placement on a table or desk. The combination of neutral gray and natural wood tones gives it a versatile look that fits well in urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A compact lamp with a gray cylindrical shade and a tripod wooden base, blending modern and natural elements. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gray shade and all three wooden legs, with the tripod structure clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the leftmost leg and the roundness of the shade, with the tripod base partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the convergence of the wooden legs and the back curve of the shade.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing two legs more prominently and the side profile of the shade.
